'''Ardal''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Solem]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was part of a resistance movement against the planetary [[Governor/Legends|Governor]], [[Malvander Bren]].

{{Char-stub}}

*[[Empire 7|''Empire'' 7]] {{1st}}
